briefs.title: BC Casinos Must Track Where Players' Money Comes From, Starting April 2026
briefs.summary: BC's Gaming Control Act now includes a Source of Funds Regulation, effective April 13, 2026, requiring gaming facilities to track and verify where players' money comes from when they buy in to gamble.
briefs.action_required: Review your gaming operations and prepare compliance processes for the Source of Funds Regulation before April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Source of Funds Regulation (Gaming Control Act) takes effect
